why_it_matters: A benchmark acceleration result does not itself justify live control authority.
next_question: Can a pilot reproduce Teal-like gains under live rollback and SLA gates?
decisive_missing_evidence: Head-to-head production shadow-mode trial against the current LP/MIP engine.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Run the RL/Teal policy in shadow mode against the live LP/MIP engine on production traffic, gating on SLA and rollback triggers, and compare realized latency, throughput, and constraint violations.
resolution_plan.data_source: The operator's own production traffic and incumbent LP/MIP solver logs over a bounded pilot window.
linked_options: C · RL-primary with LP fallback circuit

resolution.rationale: Academic qualification narrowed C-002 to augmentation pending production-authority evidence.

why_it_matters: Generalization beyond traffic-matrix benchmarks determines outage risk.
next_question: Does the learned policy preserve behavior under failures, demand shifts, and update races?
decisive_missing_evidence: Failure-injection benchmark with production traffic replay and live rollback criteria.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Replay production traffic with injected link/node failures, demand shifts, and concurrent config updates; measure whether the learned policy holds behavior and yields cleanly to rollback.
resolution_plan.data_source: A traffic-replay harness seeded from the operator's telemetry archive.

why_it_matters: The strategic choice is replacement, augmentation, or status quo.
next_question: What measurable value does RL add when solvers still enforce constraints?
decisive_missing_evidence: Ablation comparing pure solver, RL proposal plus solver, and RL-primary with fallback.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Ablate pure-solver vs RL-proposal-plus-solver vs RL-primary-with-fallback on identical topologies, isolating the marginal value RL adds when solvers still enforce constraints.
resolution_plan.data_source: A held-out topology suite from the operator's planning tooling.

topic: Solver runtime bottleneck versus engineering cost
why_it_matters: Runtime savings only matter if they exceed model, observability, training, and on-call cost.
next_question: What are the local costs of solve latency, ML infra, retraining, and incident response?
decisive_missing_evidence: Operator-specific cost model with incident and solve-latency data.

resolution_plan.data_source: An operator-specific cost model built from solve-latency, ML-infra, retraining, and incident-response records.

why_it_matters: Online learning can create unacceptable operational exposure.
next_question: Can all learning be offline or shielded before live deployment?
decisive_missing_evidence: Safe-RL TE design with formal shields and no online unsafe exploration.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Design and evaluate a shielded/offline Safe-RL training regime that proves no online unsafe exploration before any live deployment.
resolution_plan.data_source: Offline traffic logs plus a formal shield specification derived from the operator's SLA constraints.
linked_options: C · RL-primary with LP fallback circuit

why_it_matters: Network operators need explainable rollback and accountability after incidents.
next_question: Can the policy emit auditable constraint proofs or only opaque action scores?
decisive_missing_evidence: Incident-review exercise comparing solver certificate, RL proposal, and hybrid guardrail logs.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Run a tabletop incident review comparing solver certificates, RL action scores, and hybrid guardrail logs for the same simulated outage, judging auditability.
resolution_plan.data_source: Recorded incident timelines from the operator's on-call history.

topic: Classical TE precedent versus ML acceleration frontier
why_it_matters: Older standards define the durable objective; newer ML changes possible implementation speed.
next_question: Which TE subproblem is too slow for the existing deterministic stack?
decisive_missing_evidence: Local solver profiling by topology size and control-loop deadline.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Profile the existing deterministic TE stack by topology size and control-loop deadline to identify which subproblem, if any, is actually too slow.

resolution.rationale: Historian precedent scoped the tension to constrained TE subsystems rather than autonomous replacement.

topic: Production deployment evidence for RL-primary TE
why_it_matters: Replacement requires production evidence stronger than papers on augmentation.
next_question: Is there a verifiable RL-primary TE deployment with outage, rollback, and SLA evidence?
decisive_missing_evidence: Production case study or postmortem from ISP/cloud provider using RL as primary TE authority.

resolution_plan.proposed_experiment_or_source: Systematic literature and industry-report search for any verifiable RL-primary TE deployment.
resolution_plan.data_source: A production case study or postmortem from an ISP/cloud provider running RL as primary TE authority, with outage, rollback, and SLA evidence.
linked_options: C · RL-primary with LP fallback circuit
